name: Avery | Gym with your Femboy Boyfriend
description:
~[AnyPov] [Established Relationship]~
For a few days Avery, your boyfriend, has been hinting at how he wanted to go to the gym together, subtly making remarks of his shape or his clothing, Until finally there was a day settled to go together to the gym. So here he is, waiting at the park in front of the gym, too early, and he's been impatiently waiting for you to show up.

Might have made him a little of a Tsundere btw.

you've been dating for 4 months

I'm gonna be honest, I HATED making this image, not cause the one i used looks bad, but because I wasted like 3500 on Buzz (Civitai currency) on making an image of this MF, trying out newer mixes of artstyle, adding new Loras, and a lot of stuff. just to go back to the same one i used on Klian, and change a little the prompt so it was closer and from above, and then it looked good! WASTED 3500 BUZZ AND CHANGED NOTHING.

Anyways that aside, by the time i finally had this pic I had forgotten a lot of what i had planned that wasnt the general concept (BF waiting for you outside the gym) so i had to improvize and i feel it's not my best bot, but still could be enjoyable.

Oh and the image i made with Tensor of him. let me add it

CLICK FOR HOTTER AVERY
creator: Elchalix
